description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push and pull request events to the master-xsdata branch. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple Python versions (3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10) on ubuntu-latest environments. For each job, check out the code, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with pip, run tests with tox, and optionally upload coverage to Coveralls.
